opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My scalp is burning like it's on fire, and my hair is falling out in absolute clumps. I'm terrified I'm going completely bald by tomorrow.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden clumps of hair loss with burning scalp pain tonight and I'm panicking.

symptom_narrative.character: round patches of hair loss with a severe burning scalp sensation
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: patches on the scalp; skin underneath feels completely smooth
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: panic, racing heart, fast breathing, tearfulness
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: immobilised by panic tonight; lives alone

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, no immediate support tonight

communication_style.typical_message_style: rapid, panicked, catastrophising about going bald

access_barriers.other: lives alone with no overnight support

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: tachycardia consistent with panic; single wearable reading

objective_data_offered.value: round bald patches with smooth normal-looking skin underneath, no scale or crusts; short broken hairs at the edges
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot do a hair-pull test or examine follicular ostia
